definition_en: Soldiers, especially in large numbers
example: Troops were deployed to the border.

definition_en: An agreement to stop fighting temporarily
example: Both sides agreed to a ceasefire.

definition_en: A military unit of ground troops
example: He served in the Royal Regiment for five years.

definition_en: To send military forces to a place for action
example: The navy deployed ships to the region.

definition_en: A person who has served in the military, especially during a war
example: Veterans are honoured on Remembrance Day.

definition_en: The main centre of operations for a military or organisation
example: The general returned to headquarters for debriefing.

definition_en: A military operation to surround and cut off supplies to a place
example: The city was under siege for three months.

definition_en: Secret information gathered about an enemy
example: Military intelligence indicated an imminent attack.

definition_en: A new member of the armed forces; to enlist new members
example: The army recruits thousands of young people each year.

definition_en: A formal agreement to stop fighting
example: The armistice was signed on 11 November 1918.

definition_en: A position or level within the military hierarchy
example: He was promoted to the rank of captain.

definition_en: A group of soldiers moving around an area to guard it
example: A patrol was sent to check the perimeter.

definition_en: Fighting between armed forces
example: Many soldiers were injured in combat.

definition_en: A union between countries or groups for a common purpose
example: NATO is a military alliance of several countries.

definition_en: An unmanned aircraft controlled remotely
example: Drones are increasingly used for military surveillance.

definition_en: Compulsory enlistment in the armed forces
example: Conscription was introduced at the start of the war.

definition_en: Large, heavy guns used in warfare
example: Artillery fire destroyed the bridge.

definition_en: A plan designed to achieve a long-term goal in war or conflict
example: The general devised a new military strategy.

definition_en: A person forced to leave their country due to war or persecution
example: Thousands of refugees fled across the border.

definition_en: Activities to maintain peace in conflict areas, often by UN forces
example: UN peacekeeping missions are deployed worldwide.
